creator: mbeis@xs4all.nl
text:
Since FF 45.0 the icon of FF Hello has disappeared. The button is there, and can be selected, but the icon in it (the smiley) isn't visible. Deleting the ~/.mozilla directory or reinstalling has no effect. Today I upgraded to 45.0.1, but no difference.

Using FF from ports on FreeBSD 10.2-ST/amd64.

Regards,
Marco
